info.title: Employee Management System API
info.description: Enterprise HRMS — Employee Management System REST APIs

tags.name: My Support
tags.description: Self-service support and IT helpdesk tickets

tags.name: System Monitoring
tags.description: Utility features like notifications, file storage, approval center

tags.name: Employees
tags.description: Administrative employee CRUD operations

tags.name: Performance Reviews
tags.description: Conducting reviews, performance appraisal cycles, and rating logs

tags.name: My Documents
tags.description: Self-service personal document repository

tags.name: Offboarding
tags.description: Administrative exit procedures and asset clearance tasks

tags.name: Audit Logs
tags.description: Querying and exporting user activity audit trails

tags.name: My Schedule
tags.description: Self-service work shift and schedule details

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Administrative onboarding checklists, tasks, and task assignees

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Analytical report generation and system metrics exports

tags.name: Training
tags.description: Admin training courses and class scheduling

tags.name: Approvals
tags.description: Unified center for pending leaves, goals, lifecycle, and revision approvals

tags.name: Salary Revisions
tags.description: Administrative revision workflow, salary history, and increment letters

tags.name: My Exit
tags.description: Self-service exit requests and offboarding checklist

tags.name: Departments
tags.description: Administrative department management

tags.name: Recruitment
tags.description: Managing jobs, candidates, interviews, and offer letters

tags.name: Attendance
tags.description: Organization-wide attendance tracking and logs

tags.name: My Expenses
tags.description: Self-service expense claim submissions and history

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Notification center and announcement alerts

tags.name: My Profile
tags.description: Self-service profile retrieval and update endpoints

tags.name: Payroll Settings
tags.description: Configuring salary components and tax regime setups

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, registration, password reset, OTP, token refresh & session management

tags.name: My Performance
tags.description: Self-service performance reviews and self-assessments

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Global settings, password policies, MFA configurations, and system-wide configurations

tags.name: Leave Management
tags.description: Organization-wide leave request and approval tracking

tags.name: My Payslips
tags.description: Self-service personal payslip retrieval

tags.name: System Monitoring
tags.description: Health check logs, memory usage, and version info

tags.name: Administration
tags.description: Administrative actions, roles, permissions, RBAC controls, and announcements

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Document management system and permissions

tags.name: Appraisals
tags.description: Employee appraisal cycles and progress

tags.name: Goals
tags.description: Individual and team goal setups, comments, and progress tracking

tags.name: My Assets
tags.description: Self-service assets registry and support requests

tags.name: Directory
tags.description: Organization directory and manager reporting lines

tags.name: Payslips
tags.description: Administrative payslip generation and distribution

tags.name: Finance
tags.description: Expense category limits, F&F settlements, and financial analytics

tags.name: Support Desk
tags.description: IT support desk, tickets, assets, shift schedules, and settings

tags.name: Payroll Runs
tags.description: Processing payroll runs and execution logs

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Role-based landing dashboards and stats widgets
